notes: Improved tests: 2 f2p tests now execute PHP via subprocess (test_swoole_coroutine_enabled calls Swoole\Runtime::enableCoroutine; test_cli_params_skip_web_installer runs PHP to inspect class). Removed overly specific gold patterns like '&& !$this->\w+()'. Added behavioral verification for key fixes. All 15 f2p tests still preserve oracle (nop=0, gold=1).
